center.name: 阿達馬瓦高原
center.summary: 阿達馬瓦高原是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括白枕鸽、Pectoral-patch cisticola，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Adamawa Massif, Gabon, the Congo and highlands of East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Western High Plateau, the Adamawa and Bongo massifs and the Albertine Rift montane forests on the other
